reference: Hi dear, I understand your concern. You should be worried, but not too much. It is normal behavior for babies; they don't know how to swallow it. Just put some napkins under her chin; their salivary glands work very actively. I wish you and your daughter good health.
text: Hi dear! I understand your concern. You should be worried, but not too much. It is normal behavior for babies, they don't know how to swallow it. Just put some napkins under her chin. Their salivary glands work very actively. I wish you and your daughter good health!
